name: reflect
description: Reflect on your own working session — the one reflexive, cross-cutting family (the work process itself, not the code/decisions/docs/reasoning the other plugins operate on); it sits across the object-families, not parallel to them. Three skills, one read/write pair plus a distiller: catchup/park work the cursor (catchup orients — where the work stands now + next, rebuilt from git/diff/plan, not chat memory, checking a parked HANDOFF.md first; park writes that same five-shape cursor + the current git SHA into HANDOFF.md before stepping away), observe works the knowledge (scans the session directly and distills the one durable, reusable learning into a knowledge base — a plain session recap needs no skill, so summarize was retired, ADR-079). Read-only except park's and observe's single writes. Cross-project, language-agnostic.
